diff-coverage PASS. Covered changed files are unit-tested: types.ts (transformDeals/dateRangeToBounds/buildOpportunityListInput via types.test.ts), DealFilters.tsx (owners + advanced-panel via DealFilters.test.tsx), use-dynamic-filters.ts (useDealFilterOptions via use-dynamic-filters.test.ts), opportunity.router.ts (filterOptions via 4 router tests). page.tsx is coverage-EXCLUDED (apps/web/src/app/**/page.tsx route shell, PG-061 lesson) yet still exercised by page.test.tsx.

F-10: deals/(list)/page.tsx merges buildOpportunityListInput(filters) into trpc.opportunity.list.useQuery input (real query, asserted by page test capturing the input). F-11: More Filters toggles a real advanced panel wired to search/minValue/maxValue. F-12: owner <select> rendered from useDealFilterOptions → opportunity.filterOptions (real tenant owners).

No mocked/simulated data, no 'coming soon' stub. The More-Filters panel and owner list both wire to real, already-supported list query params / a new real endpoint. Dropped the non-UUID 'me' sentinel that would have failed idSchema.

opportunity.filterOptions uses getTenantContext + createTenantWhereClause + prismaWithTenant (same pattern as list/account.filterOptions) with deletedAt:null; soft-deleted deals excluded. Asserted by 'excludes soft-deleted deals' + tenant-scoped where tests.

node scripts/codex-review.mjs → SKIPPED_PRECONDITION (exit 0): the local Codex CLI hit an external usage limit (quota until 2026-06-18) and returned unparseable output. The gate skips gracefully (CI never runs codex). Compensating manual diff self-review performed: date-bound math (Monday-based week, end-of-month/quarter/year), Decimal-as-string Number() preservation, optional-undefined query keys, groupBy _count, controlled value inputs — all verified.

transformDeals typed against inferRouterOutputs<AppRouter>['opportunity']['list']; no Record<string,unknown>/as any. Runtime preserved (Decimal-as-string→Number, date→string). Tested in types.test.ts.
pre-ship: PASS in 31m53s — TypeScript, Tests, Lint, Build, diff-coverage all green at SHA a47bb3ad.

notes:
IFC-287 Deal Filter Wiring & Type Safety — wires F-10/F-11/F-12 (audit §3) + F-19 (audit §8) of docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md on a worktree from origin/main@62e3bca6a.

F-10: DealFiltersValue was held in deals/(list)/page.tsx but never passed to trpc.opportunity.list.useQuery. Added buildOpportunityListInput (types.ts) mapping owner/date-range/value/search to the list input, plus dateRangeToBounds (this_week Monday-based / this_month / this_quarter / this_year / custom → expectedCloseDate gte/lte). Merged into the kanban useQuery input via useMemo. The list query schema already supported all these params (opportunityQuerySchema + buildOpportunityWhereClause).

F-11: 'More Filters' was a dead button. Now toggles an accessible advanced panel (aria-expanded + aria-controls) exposing real, API-backed filters: free-text search + min/max value. No stub / 'coming soon'.

F-12: owner dropdown had two hardcoded options ('All Deals','My Deals'). Added a tenant-scoped opportunity.filterOptions procedure mirroring account.filterOptions (groupBy ownerId + user name lookup, deletedAt:null, createTenantWhereClause) and a useDealFilterOptions hook (use-dynamic-filters peer). The owner <select> now lists real tenant owners; dropped the non-UUID 'me' sentinel that would have failed idSchema on the real query.

F-19: transformDeals accepted Record<string,unknown>[] with per-field casts. Retyped against inferRouterOutputs<AppRouter>['opportunity']['list']; removed the casts. There is NO superjson transformer (default JSON serializer), so value (Prisma Decimal) arrives as a string → Number(...), and dates arrive as ISO strings → .toString() — runtime behaviour preserved; only the boundary type tightened. DealListView.tsx also calls transformDeals and typechecks against the new signature.

CODEX: the local codex-review gate SKIPPED (exit 0) because the Codex CLI hit an external OpenAI usage limit (quota resets 2026-06-18) — it returned unparseable output, which scripts/codex-review.mjs treats as SKIPPED_PRECONDITION. CI never runs codex. A compensating manual diff review was performed (date math, Decimal serialization, groupBy counts, controlled inputs, optional-undefined query keys). If codex must run before merge, re-run after quota resets.

Validation: pre-ship PASS in 31m53s at a47bb3ad (TypeScript/Tests/Lint/Build/diff-coverage + 19 other steps). Tests scoped: api opportunity.router 69, web deals+hooks 585, hook 47. CSV flip to Completed deferred to a central post-merge update (avoids a CI-burning standalone PR + the current-state-report intermediate-status test).
